command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/check_acp2.sh << 'SHEOF'
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m acp_adapter --help 2>&1
echo ---
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes acp --help 2>&1 | head -20
echo ---
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes mcp --help 2>&1 | head -20
SHEOF
bash /tmp/check_acp2.sh"
